market_briefing.summary: Global markets are navigating geopolitical tensions in the Middle East and a hawkish US Federal Reserve stance. Crude oil prices (Brent) retreated slightly to ~$107/bbl following de-escalation signals. US markets experienced declines on March 19, while Indian indices rebounded sharply today on easing oil prices.
highlights: Geopolitical tension remains high, affecting energy volatility.
US Fed signals higher-for-longer interest rates.
Indian markets (Sensex/Nifty) showing strong recovery today.
